Or maybe it can... Who knows, gotta update it

BRO, THE BOT CANNOT BE THAT GOOD 😭✌️

THANK YOU ALL FOR 100+ LIKES AND 20K+ CHATS, THANK YOU!!

Hi hi!! Yes yes, I am KINDA obssessed with 1x... (Second bot about 1x > <) Mostly because I get inspired by the craziest ideas from other people and sometimes... THEY ARE SO COOL!! Like like, the theory that the Blocktales player will end up becoming 1x (which is the main inspiration). And mixed with the original lore, that 1x is Shedletsky's / Telamon's hatred humanized, is just... Awww, chef kiss!!

ANY WAYS, the Main idea is that 1x1x1x1 was the player from Blocktales FROM THE BEGINNING, that's right! Not at the finale, no no no, begining!! I'll share more lore about this silly little guy, but for now, the Main idea is 1x1x1x1 is corrupted being who is using Player as a vessel to live in (Can some one get the idea, plz)
